hero.title: Connecting Villages to Essential Services
hero.subtitle: Report infrastructure issues, track progress, and improve rural communities with transparent governance.

how.section_subtitle: A simple four-step process to resolve community issues.

step1.title: Citizen Reports Issue
step1.desc: Log in and describe the problem. Upload photos and pin the exact location.

step2.title: Admin Assigns Worker
step2.desc: Local authorities review the report and assign the right worker.

step3.title: Worker Fixes Issue
step3.desc: The assigned worker visits the site, resolves the issue, and uploads proof.

step4.title: Citizen Confirms
step4.desc: The citizen reviews the resolution and confirms the issue is fixed.

categories.section_subtitle: Covering the essential infrastructure services that matter most.

water.title: Water Supply
water.desc: Report leaks, contamination, or disruptions in water supply to your village.

electricity.title: Electricity
electricity.desc: Flag power outages, faulty wiring, or transformer issues in your area.

health.title: Health
health.desc: Request health camp visits, report sanitation issues, or medical emergencies.

roads.title: Roads
roads.desc: Report potholes, damaged bridges, or waterlogged roads needing repair.

documents.title: Documents
documents.desc: Request certificates, permits, or other official document assistance.

offline.title: Offline Reporting
offline.desc: Submit requests even without internet. Data syncs automatically when connectivity returns.

map_tracking.title: Map-based Tracking
map_tracking.desc: Pinpoint exact issue locations on an interactive map for faster resolution.

realtime_updates.title: Real-time Updates
realtime_updates.desc: Track the status of every request in real time from submission to resolution.

photo_evidence.title: Photo Evidence
photo_evidence.desc: Attach photos to clearly show the problem and verify resolution quality.

transparent_governance.title: Transparent Governance
transparent_governance.desc: Every action is logged and visible, fostering trust between citizens and authorities.

citizen_feedback.title: Citizen Feedback
citizen_feedback.desc: Rate resolutions and share feedback to continuously improve service delivery.

government.title: For Gram Panchayat & Local Authorities
government.subtitle: Empower your governance with data and transparency.

analytics.title: Data-driven Rural Governance
analytics.desc: Track complaint trends, worker performance, and infrastructure issues through powerful analytics dashboards.

cta.title: Ready to improve your community?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of citizens and local authorities working together for better rural infrastructure.

footer.tagline: Empowering rural communities through transparent technology.
